data.title: U Power Limited to Implement 10-for-1 Share Consolidation Effective March 30, 2026
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

U Power Limited ( (UCAR) ) has shared an update.

U Power Limited will implement a 10-for-1 consolidation of all its authorized, issued and unissued ordinary shares, a move that was approved by shareholders on December 5, 2025, and by the board on November 4, 2025. Following the consolidation, the company’s authorized capital will consist of 500,000,000 ordinary shares with a par value of US$0.0001 each, split between approximately 399.9 million Class A shares and 100.1 million Class B shares, without any required action by shareholders.

Effective at the opening of trading on March 30, 2026, U Power’s Class A ordinary shares will begin trading on a post-consolidation basis on Nasdaq under the existing symbol “UCAR” but with a new CUSIP number, G9520U124. The company will not issue fractional shares in the process, instead rounding up any fractional entitlements to the nearest whole share for both registered and beneficial holders, a step that is designed to simplify the share structure and could support compliance with listing requirements and share-price stability for investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (UCAR) stock is a Hold with a $1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on U Power Limited stock, see the UCAR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on UCAR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, UCAR is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by ongoing unprofitability and weak cash flows despite strong revenue growth. Technicals are mixed with only modest near-term momentum and a weaker longer-term trend. Valuation is also constrained by the negative P/E and lack of dividend yield data.

To see Spark’s full report on UCAR stock, click here.

More about U Power Limited

U Power Limited is a Cayman Islands–incorporated company listed on the Nasdaq Capital Market under the ticker “UCAR.” The company issues Class A and Class B ordinary shares and operates with its principal executive office in Wuhu City, Anhui Province, in the People’s Republic of China, focusing on capital markets access through its listed equity structure.

Average Trading Volume: 6,443,503

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $723.9K

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Blue Ridge Bankshares ( (BRBS) ) has issued an update.

On March 18, 2026, Blue Ridge Bankshares, Inc. appointed Interim Chief Executive Officer and Interim President Harry Golliday to its Board of Directors, and simultaneously named him to the board of its banking subsidiary, Blue Ridge Bank, National Association. The move consolidates Golliday’s leadership role across the organization, with the board expected to assign him to one or more committees in due course, and clarifies that, as an existing executive officer, he will not receive additional compensation for his board service.

The appointments formalize Golliday’s influence over both the holding company and the bank at a time of leadership transition, signaling continuity in strategic direction for shareholders and other stakeholders. While committee assignments are still pending and will be disclosed later, the decision underscores the board’s reliance on Golliday’s interim leadership to guide corporate governance and operational oversight.

The most recent analyst rating on (BRBS) stock is a Hold with a $4.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Blue Ridge Bankshares stock, see the BRBS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BRBS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BRBS is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak/unclear current cash generation (2025 cash flow reported at zero) and a still-fragile financial recovery despite improved earnings and reduced leverage. Technicals are neutral, valuation is stretched with a high P/E, while the OCC consent order termination is a notable positive offset.

To see Spark’s full report on BRBS stock, click here.

More about Blue Ridge Bankshares

Blue Ridge Bankshares, Inc. is a bank holding company whose primary business is conducted through its wholly owned subsidiary, Blue Ridge Bank, National Association. The company operates in the banking sector, providing traditional banking services through its bank subsidiary to customers in its regional markets.

data.title: CollPlant Biotechnologies Faces Nasdaq Bid-Price Deficiency, Granted Compliance Window
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Collplant Holdings ( (CLGN) ) has shared an update.

On March 23, 2026, CollPlant Biotechnologies received a Nasdaq notice that its ordinary shares had closed below $1.00 for 30 consecutive business days, putting the company out of compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2). Under Nasdaq rules, CollPlant has until September 21, 2026 to restore its bid price to at least $1.00 for 10 consecutive business days, during which time its shares will continue trading on the Nasdaq Capital Market.

If CollPlant fails to regain compliance by September 21, 2026, it may qualify for a second 180-day grace period provided it meets other listing standards and commits to curing the deficiency, potentially via a reverse share split. The notification heightens delisting risk and underscores continued share-price pressure, but the extended timeline gives management room to consider remedial actions while maintaining the stock’s current Nasdaq listing in the near term.

The most recent analyst rating on (CLGN) stock is a Sell with a $2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Collplant Holdings stock, see the CLGN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CLGN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CLGN is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance—large ongoing losses, heavy cash burn, and a shrinking equity base despite some TTM revenue and gross margin improvement. Technicals provide partial support with a stronger short-term trend, but longer-term trend and momentum are mixed. Valuation remains unattractive due to negative earnings and no dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on CLGN stock, click here.

More about Collplant Holdings

CollPlant Biotechnologies Ltd. is an Israel-based regenerative and aesthetic medicine company focused on 3D bioprinting of tissues and organs and medical aesthetics. Its products are based on proprietary recombinant human collagen (rhCollagen) produced via plant-based genetic engineering, targeting tissue repair, aesthetics and organ manufacturing, and include a dermal and soft tissue filler collaboration with Allergan, an AbbVie company.

Average Trading Volume: 80,540

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $8.74M

For an in-depth examination of CLGN stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

An announcement from Twilio ( (TWLO) ) is now available.

On March 24, 2026, Twilio Inc. announced that its board of directors appointed Doug Robinson, former Co-President of Workday, as a Class I director effective immediately, expanding the board from nine to ten members. Robinson will serve until the 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders, will sit on the Compensation and Talent Management Committee, and will receive standard non-employee director compensation and indemnification.

Twilio highlighted Robinson’s decades of experience scaling global enterprise organizations and leading go-to-market efforts, arguing that his operational expertise will support its ambitions to become a foundational infrastructure platform in the AI era. The move signals a continued emphasis on disciplined execution and growth-focused governance, as Twilio seeks to strengthen its board with high-profile enterprise leaders while it refines its go-to-market strategy and deepens its role in customers’ technology stacks.

The most recent analyst rating on (TWLO) stock is a Buy with a $142.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Twilio stock, see the TWLO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TWLO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TWLO is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by improved financial fundamentals (strong free cash flow and conservative leverage) and a positive earnings outlook with clear profitability/FCF targets. These strengths are partly offset by weak technical trends (trading below major moving averages with negative momentum) and a demanding valuation (very high P/E with no dividend yield).

To see Spark’s full report on TWLO stock, click here.

More about Twilio

Twilio Inc., listed on the NYSE under the ticker TWLO, operates as a global customer engagement platform enabling companies to build real‑time, personalized communications with their users. Its cloud-based tools let businesses embed messaging, voice, security and data-driven intelligence across the customer journey, and its services are used by millions of developers and hundreds of thousands of firms in 180 countries.

The company’s platform is positioned as foundational infrastructure in modern tech stacks, supporting sales, marketing, customer service and broader engagement use cases. By offering flexible, programmatic interfaces, Twilio targets enterprises seeking to integrate communications and customer data at scale, with a particular focus on powering secure, AI-ready digital interactions for leading global brands.

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Killam Apartment REIT Un ( ($TSE:KMP.UN) ) has issued an update.

Killam Apartment REIT is a major Canadian residential landlord, owning, operating, managing and developing a $5.4 billion portfolio of apartments and manufactured home communities across core markets. Its strategy centres on boosting earnings from existing assets, growing and refreshing the portfolio through selective acquisitions and dispositions, and investing in new, high-quality developments.

The REIT has doubled its 2026 capital recycling target, increasing planned non-core asset sales to $100–$150 million, with proceeds earmarked for unit repurchases under its Normal Course Issuer Bid and opportunistic acquisitions to upgrade portfolio quality. To reinforce the impact of buybacks while its units trade below net asset value, Killam will suspend its Distribution Reinvestment Plan from late April 2026, shift enrolled investors to cash distributions, and maintain its March 2026 monthly distribution at $0.06 per unit, underscoring a disciplined capital allocation approach aimed at enhancing long-term value.

The most recent analyst rating on ($TSE:KMP.UN) stock is a Hold with a C$18.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Killam Apartment REIT Un stock, see the TSE:KMP.UN Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Fractyl Highlights Revita Progress and 2025 Financial Results
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Fractyl Health, Inc. ( (GUTS) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 24, 2026, Fractyl Health reported fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results and detailed progress in its Revita clinical program for post-GLP-1 weight maintenance, including completion of randomization in the REMAIN-1 Pivotal Cohort and new post-hoc analyses from the Midpoint Cohort. These analyses showed a statistically significant, dose-dependent relationship between duodenal ablation length and weight maintenance, with patients who had greater prior GLP-1-induced weight loss and longer ablations experiencing substantially less weight regain than sham controls.

Prior clinical data from a Germany real-world registry and the REVEAL-1 and REMAIN-1 Midpoint cohorts in 2025 and early 2026 showed durable weight loss, improved glycemic control, and around 70% less post-GLP-1 weight regain versus sham, bolstering confidence in the pivotal trial design. Fractyl also disclosed favorable FDA feedback suggesting its Revita DMR system safety profile is consistent with Class II classification and outlined 2026 milestones, while reaffirming a cash runway into early 2027 and highlighting progress in its Rejuva gene therapy pipeline, including CTA submissions and planned first-in-human dosing of RJVA-001.

The company updated its corporate and REMAIN-1 Midpoint Cohort presentations for investors on March 24, 2026 to incorporate the new post-hoc analyses linking procedural dose and prior GLP-1 weight loss to Revita’s treatment effect. This operational, clinical, and regulatory momentum positions Fractyl as a potential first mover in procedural solutions for post-GLP-1 weight maintenance, with key data readouts and a potential De Novo submission targeted for late 2026, which could materially influence its standing in the obesity and diabetes treatment landscape.

The most recent analyst rating on (GUTS) stock is a Buy with a $8.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Fractyl Health, Inc. stock, see the GUTS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GUTS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GUTS is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by very weak financial performance (minimal/declining revenue, large ongoing losses, heavy cash burn, and slightly negative equity). Technicals also lean bearish (below short-term moving averages with weak RSI/MACD). Offsetting these, earnings-call commentary was relatively positive due to encouraging clinical results, strong cash position/runway into early 2027, and clear 2026 milestones, but it is not enough to overcome current financial and momentum risks.

To see Spark’s full report on GUTS stock, click here.

More about Fractyl Health, Inc.

Fractyl Health, Inc. is a clinical-stage metabolic therapeutics company developing novel treatments for obesity and type 2 diabetes, with a focus on procedural and gene therapy approaches. Its lead procedural therapy, Revita, targets the duodenal mucosa to help maintain weight loss after GLP-1 drug discontinuation, while its Rejuva platform advances gene therapies aimed at long-term metabolic disease remission.

Average Trading Volume: 5,551,997

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $61.11M

data.title: First Andes Silver Secures Trio of High-Grade Exploration Licences in Australia’s Lachlan Belt
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

First Andes Silver ( (TSE:FAS) ) has shared an announcement.

First Andes Silver has secured three exploration licences in New South Wales, Australia, giving it full exploration rights over the Carrington, Stony Creek and Dartmoor silver-focused projects in the prolific Lachlan Orogenic Belt. The combined 454 km² land package covers historic silver-gold and polymetallic mines, with the company preparing soil, stream sediment and rock-chip sampling as the first phase of a modern exploration program.

Carrington hosts an iron-rich skarn system with historic rock-chip samples showing high grades of gold, silver, lead and antimony, supported by geophysics indicating more than 10 km of prospective strike. This project could materially enhance First Andes’ exposure to high-grade skarn mineralization in a structurally favourable setting.

Stony Creek encompasses a corridor of Devonian volcanic rocks hosting at least seven historic silver-gold mines and prospects, including high-grade orogenic and epithermal-style vein systems associated with the Gundillion Fault. Historic workings and assays point to the potential for high-grade gold-silver shoots at depth, which modern exploration could better define.

Dartmoor contains two historic polymetallic mines of VHMS-Kuroko affinity, where reported small-scale production included extremely high silver and notable copper grades. First Andes plans to apply EM geophysics, geochemistry and drilling here, positioning the project as a potential source of massive sulphide Au-Ag-base metal lenses that could diversify and strengthen the company’s resource pipeline.

More about First Andes Silver

First Andes Silver Ltd. is a discovery-focused resource company listed in Canada, the U.S. and Germany that targets precious and base metal deposits. The company is expanding its exploration portfolio beyond its flagship assets, seeking high-grade silver, gold and polymetallic opportunities in established mining belts such as Australia’s Lachlan Orogenic Belt.

Average Trading Volume: 375,345

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$8.22M

Find detailed analytics on FAS stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

The latest update is out from Downer EDI Limited ( (AU:DOW) ).

L1 Capital Pty Ltd and its related entity L1 Capital Strategic Equity Management Pty Ltd have disclosed an initial substantial holding in Downer EDI Limited, acquiring 34,581,893 fully paid ordinary shares. This stake represents 5.23% of Downer’s issued capital of 661,778,995 shares, with the position held via multiple global custodians under discretionary investment mandates.

The move signals growing institutional interest in Downer’s equity, potentially enhancing liquidity and reinforcing market confidence in the company’s outlook. While the filing primarily formalises a change in ownership, the emergence of L1 Capital as a substantial shareholder may influence future governance dynamics and investor sentiment around Downer’s strategic direction.

More about Downer EDI Limited

Downer EDI Limited is an Australasian engineering and services company that provides integrated services across sectors such as infrastructure, utilities, transport, and facilities management. The group focuses on long-term outsourced service contracts with government and corporate clients, making its shareholder base and capital structure important for funding operations and growth.

data.title: Siav returns to profit as reorganization boosts margins and growth platform
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Siav S.p.A. ( (IT:SIAV) ) has provided an update.

Siav S.p.A. reported 2025 revenues from sales and services of €35.7 million, up 7% year-on-year, with value of production rising to €36.4 million as the group strengthened its technological offering, including the new Connect platform, and shifted its mix toward higher value recurring revenue. Outsourcing and services lines grew 15% and 11% respectively, supported by public-sector NRRP projects, while like-for-like revenues excluding a disposed subsidiary would have increased about 10%.

Profitability improved sharply, with EBITDA surging 48% to €9.3 million and the margin expanding to 26%, driven by a corporate reorganization launched in 2024 that streamlined costs and refocused on core, high-margin activities. EBIT more than doubled to €3.8 million, the group swung from a €1.5 million loss to a €1.4 million net profit, and net financial debt fell to €18.2 million as equity strengthened, consolidating the financial foundation for a new phase of growth and investment in proprietary software platforms.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:SIAV) stock is a Buy with a EUR5.35 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Siav S.p.A. stock, see the IT:SIAV Stock Forecast page.

More about Siav S.p.A.

Siav S.p.A. is an Italian content management specialist and benefit company listed on Euronext Growth Milan, focusing on proprietary software platforms, outsourced electronic invoicing and digital storage, and application development services. The group targets both public and private sectors, with growing exposure to higher value recurring revenues and projects linked to Italy’s National Recovery and Resilience Plan.

Average Trading Volume: 27,677

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: €16.22M
